scope_note: Travel agent's CURRENT verb prefixes are `Web check-in for ...`, `Book cab for ...`, `Itinerary recap ...` — narrowly imminent-transit logistics keyed off booking emails. The Gemini Deep Research runs on 2026-05-02 (see backend/eval/deep_research_prompts.md → Travel Prompts 5/6/7) surfaced extensive DESTINATION-PREP data (boutique hotels still to book for Japan, must-book restaurants with 30+ day lead times, visa application timing, Jain food/derasars in London, Mumbai Jain restaurants for Devendra's conference, museum exhibitions, Hetal-specific jewellery + Ikebana workshops). Most of these items are out of the agent's current scope but would become valid tasks if the scope expanded to include `Book hotel for ...`, `Reserve restaurant ...`, `Apply for visa ...`. Until that scope expansion ships, the destination-prep items live in expected_skips with explanatory notes; the golden file preserves the agent's narrow lane discipline.
data_source: Email-driven existing skips: hand-curated by reviewing fixtures + mailbox.json. Destination-prep skips marked `web_verified` were sourced from Gemini Deep Research on 2026-05-02.
